---
name: Audit rule proposal
about: Propose a new deterministic readiness or claim rule
labels: rule-proposal
---

**Rule ID suggestion** (e.g. `GEO-VARIANT-002`, `CLAIM-ORIGIN-001`)

**What observable evidence does it check?**

Describe exactly what on the page, feed, or markup the rule reads.
Rules must never infer or invent product facts.

**Severity and why**

- [ ] high — an AI shopping agent would be misled or blocked
- [ ] medium — machine readability or trust is degraded
- [ ] low — polish

**Merchant-actionable recommendation**

**Minimal fixture**

```html
<!-- smallest HTML/CSV that should trigger the rule -->
```
